markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Hand off to a new GrowthX manager and resolve a critical SEO tracking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New POC:** Carly Piekos is the new GrowthX manager, bringing 8 years of B2B SaaS SEO/content experience.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**GSC Fixed:** A hostname mismatch (`https://vizcom.com` vs. `https://www.vizcom.com`) was identified as the cause of the GSC data issue. Carly will connect with Vizcom's CTO, Kaelin, to resolve it.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Site Launch:** The new Vizcom site launches Thursday, Jan 8. Carly will provide SEO guidance for the migration, including redirect strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:** Vizcom's CEO is sensitive to competitor mentions in listicles. Content must also improve its visual identity to match the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

## Topics

### GSC Tracking Issue

  - [**Problem:** No organic search data was appearing in Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Cause:** A hostname mismatch was identified.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [GSC was tracking `https://vizcom.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [The correct property should be `https://www.vizcom.com` (a specific URL prefix) or `vizcom.com` (a domain property).](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Carly will connect with Vizcom's CTO, Kaelin, who owns the DNS, to fix the configuration.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### Vizcom Website Redesign & Launch

  - [**Timeline:** The new site launches Thursday, Jan 8, to unblock delayed marketing campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Scope:** The launch includes a new sitemap with new pages and URL slug changes.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**SEO Support:** Carly will provide SEO guidance for the migration, focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Redirect strategy to prevent SEO issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Submitting the new sitemap in GSC post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [**Staged Rollout:** Some sections (e.g., case studies, docs) will be hidden at launch and rolled out later.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Content Review & Feedback

  - [**Status:** 10+ drafts are awaiting review; 5 new drafts are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Key Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Visuals:** Content must better align with Vizcom's visual brand identity.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Competitor Mentions:** The CEO is sensitive to competitor listicles. Content must "lightly thread the needle" on this topic.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Author Tags:** The new blog format requires author tags.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use real people (e.g., internal reviewers) instead of "Team Vizcom." This provides a stronger SEO authority signal.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** Maura noted missing images in some drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Clarification:** GrowthX provides images in the GSC doc. Featured images are a publishing requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [**Enrichment Strategy:** Deeper enrichment (e.g., product images) is prioritized for top-performing articles post-launch to maximize ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Team & Process Updates

  - [**New GrowthX POC:** Carly Piekos is the new Engagement Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Background:** 8 years in B2B SaaS SEO/content (Conductor, agency).](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Focus:** Accelerating results, maintaining quality, and refining the visual strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Vizcom Team Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Emily Lonetto (Marketing Lead) is on mat leave starting Jan 13.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Kim Lu will manage marketing operations.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Chris (Product Designer) and Jordan (CEO) may provide content feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Connect with Vizcom CTO Kaelin to resolve the GSC hostname mismatch.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Provide SEO guidance for the new site migration (redirects, sitemap submission).](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Share the new vs. old sitemap comparison with Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Clarify the image workflow with the content team (Sydney, Jenny).](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Send 5 new drafts this week.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Vizcom Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Review all outstanding drafts, focusing on visuals and competitor framing.](https://fathom.video/share/tt1wewAkZ8ZpDn88QWTuG7RaRzj2bKUi?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
